themes: The backlog is dominated by Managers across multi-location franchise and property management brands, signaling that the most pressing pain points are around day-to-day efficiency — specifically saving time on location reporting, content workflows, and performance monitoring at scale.

Several accounts appear multiple times with different contacts and escalating wait times (e.g., Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Avenue5 Residential), suggesting these are high-engagement accounts with active internal interest that may have unresolved product questions or competing priorities worth addressing together.

Wait times range from 8 to 360 days, with a long tail of contacts waiting over 100 days, indicating a systemic backlog risk — prioritizing outreach to the longest-waiting contacts, especially Administrators who hold account-wide influence, could protect retention and surface strategic product feedback before it becomes a churn signal.
